rationale: Faithful AS-IS implementation of frozen v15 Task 4a (incl. AM-40/AM-41) with no reinterpretation or scope expansion. inventory.mjs commits exact sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS (five spine packages) + explicit PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE (three siblings), DOC_ROOTS + DOC_WEAVER_EXCLUDE/GLOBAL_EXCLUDE, CONTRACT_FILES (D31), empty LEDGER_SOURCES + RUN_SOURCES, five weaver ids/versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS table EXACTLY equal to the normative table (unit-proven), LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS deep-frozen/exact (D32 units for deep-equal/keys/values/freeze/mutation), and ONLY git+code WEAVER_IMPL_FILES equal to their derived D33 closures (no nonexistent files; D17/AM-17). util.mjs exports the single shared D33 classifier+resolver (used by both closure derivation and code weaver; AM-34 test 19), dependency-free comment/string-aware lexer with AM-41 enforced closed profile (fail-closed unsupported-module-lexical-profile on exact b1–b6 + one optional leading shebang; original-component lstat before collapse), Phase-1 export scanner, real-file walker (reject escape/symlink), D26/D29 counted-iterator (count only on completed consumption; accessor driver-held only), D21 physical-containment (lstat every component, never follow), and no-shell git wrapper (exact subcommands/arg shapes only). test-closure.mjs derives closures via the shared classifier/resolver, proves committed inventories EQUAL derived (never trusted), covers every accepted form (incl. form-only fixtures that fail on omission) + recursion/cycles/unreachable-literal + permitted merkle-dag + all fatal/no-edge modes + AM-41. git.mjs emits introduced-by via exact `git log -S<symbol> --format=%H --reverse -- <path>` / `git log --format=%H --reverse -- <path>`, first result, git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warns. code.mjs emits depends-on over all four endpoint shapes with symbol- vs file-level threading, unrepresentable-consumer ONLY for unresolvable, unused/no-edge, dedup. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node:/clotho-relative/permitted-vendor only, spine read-only, confined to clotho/. Gate meets; later tasks (4b/5) correctly absent. Stakes signature on approve.
